post.description: Streaming endpoint that utilizes PostgreSQL conversations, pgvector memory, and AI Provider.

Simulates advanced Computer Vision capabilities to recognize food from images.
Returns portion estimation, macro estimation, confidence scoring, and vitamin content.

get.description: Fetch active goals and habit tracking status for the user.

Returns AI-detected habit decline warnings. 
This hooks into the intelligence background worker analysis.
Generate a personalized AI Health Intelligence report using the user's real data.
